text: TechFlow delivered the Platform late, going live on 18 November 2024, some seven weeks after the contractual go-live date.
source_quote: the Platform did not go live until 18 November 2024, some seven weeks after the contractual go-live date of 1 October 2024

text: Meridian did not at any time request any change to the agreed scope, and all delay was caused by TechFlow.
source_quote: Meridian did not at any time request any change to the agreed scope of the works

text: TechFlow failed to provide adequate training to Meridian's staff in the use of the Platform.
source_quote: TechFlow failed to provide adequate training to Meridian's staff in the use of the Platform
